body:
## Rationale

Fills the final gap in the Behemoth arc between `thelema-6-drum-setup` (#2442, 2000) and `demigod-drum-setup` (#2339, 2004). *Zos Kia Cultus (Here and Beyond)* (2002) is Behemoth's 5th studio album тАФ it marks the full crystallisation of their symphonic/blackened-death sound and the last album before *Demigod* launched them internationally.

**Full arc (post-filing)**:
`satanica-drum-setup` (#2450, 1999) тЖТ `thelema-6-drum-setup` (#2442, 2000) тЖТ **`zos-kia-cultus-drum-setup`** (2002, this proposal) тЖТ `demigod-drum-setup` (#2339, 2004) тЖТ `the-apostasy-drum-setup` (#2385, 2007) тЖТ `evangelion-drum-setup` тЬЕ тЖТ `the-satanist-drum-setup` тЬЕ

Inferno at **8.33% GSC CTR** тАФ every article that reaches Inferno searchers has high conversion potential. Zos Kia Cultus features 'Here and Beyond', 'As Above So Below', and 'Horns ov Baphomet' тАФ significant blast beat showcases. The album used Inferno's evolving Tama Starclassic configuration but with the first notable Meinl cymbal integration that defined his Behemoth sound from Demigod onward. Distinct gear context from Satanica (1999) and Thelema.6 (2000): the production on ZKC (Hertz Studios, Poland) changed the kit's perceived attack significantly.

**Dedup confirmed:** Searched all open seo-proposals тАФ no prior Zos Kia Cultus proposal found. `zos-kia-cultus-drum-setup` slug absent from albumArticles.js (143 entries confirmed).

## File to create/update

**`/packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js`** тАФ add entry `'zos-kia-cultus-drum-setup'`:
- drummer: Inferno (inferno)
- band: Behemoth
- year: 2002
- gear era: Tama Starclassic Maple + early Meinl Byzance integration (transitional era)
- `relatedAlbums: ['thelema-6-drum-setup', 'demigod-drum-setup', 'whats-in-infernos-kit']`
- FAQPage JSON-LD with тЙе3 Q&A pairs

**`/public/llms/articles/zos-kia-cultus-drum-setup.md`** тАФ AI-citation-ready markdown.

## Quality gate

- `/articles/zos-kia-cultus-drum-setup` resolves with 200
- Gear breakdown distinguishes Tama/Meinl configuration from Satanica era
- FAQPage JSON-LD present with тЙе3 pairs
- All `relatedAlbums` slugs exist in albumArticles.js
- LLM file created at `/public/llms/articles/zos-kia-cultus-drum-setup.md`

## Verify

```bash
curl -s https://metalforge.io/articles/zos-kia-cultus-drum-setup | grep -c 'Inferno'
# > 0

node -e "import('./packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js').then(m => console.log('zos-kia-cultus-drum-setup' in m.ALBUM_ARTICLES))"
# true
```
title: SEO: Behemoth 'Zos Kia Cultus' drum setup article (Inferno, 2002 тАФ fills Thelema.6тЖТDemigod arc gap, symphonic-death transition)
